title: Reply miss voice message ability

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, the voice message ability relly help much our life…

Because just push button, talk and send message VS 2 hands typing, need sit down and your eyes need put on it…

Thanks for that ability really to use when we start an Update, but right now there still miss that ability when we reply an Update…Please consider that so efficient communication format, could you enable Voice Message ability from Reply too?
